languages.text: "Мы проведем тщательный осмотр каждого из поддающихся аугментации органов в вашем теле, Лорд-капитан, и заменим наименее эффективный".
"We will carry out a thorough examination of each organ suitable for augmentation, Lord Captain, and replace whichever is least efficient."
languages.original_text: "Мы проведем тщательный осмотр каждого из поддающихся аугментации органов в вашем теле, Лорд-капитан, и заменим наименее эффективный".

traits.locale_text: "We will carry out a thorough examination of each organ suitable for augmentation, Lord Captain, and replace whichever is least efficient."
"We will carry out a thorough examination of each organ suitable for augmentation, Lord Captain, and replace whichever is least efficient."
"We will carry out a thorough examination of each organ suitable for augmentation, Lord Captain, and replace whichever is least efficient."

languages.text: 「強化に適した各器官を徹底的に検査し、最も効率の低いものを交換いたします、艦長様」
languages.original_text: "We will carry out a thorough examination of each organ suitable for augmentation, Lord Captain, and replace whichever is least efficient."

traits.locale_text: 「強化に適した各器官を徹底的に検査し、最も効率の低いものを交換いたします、艦長様。」

languages.text: “舰长大人，我们将彻底检查所有适合进行植入物改造的器官，并替换掉效率最低的那个。”
languages.original_text: "We will carry out a thorough examination of each organ suitable for augmentation, Lord Captain, and replace whichever is least efficient."

traits.locale_text: “舰长大人，我们将彻底检查所有适合进行植入物改造的器官，并替换掉效率最低的那个。”

languages.text: « Nous effectuerons un examen approfondi de chaque organe susceptible d'être augmenté, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}, et nous remplacerons les moins efficaces. »
languages.original_text: "We will carry out a thorough examination of each organ suitable for augmentation, Lord Captain, and replace whichever is least efficient."

traits.locale_text: « Nous effectuerons un examen approfondi de chaque organe susceptible d'être augmenté, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}, et nous remplacerons les moins efficaces. »

languages.text: «Realizaremos un examen detallado de todos los órganos apropiados para su aumento y reemplazaremos los menos eficientes, Lord Capitán».
languages.original_text: "We will carry out a thorough examination of each organ suitable for augmentation, Lord Captain, and replace whichever is least efficient."

traits.locale_text: «Realizaremos un examen detallado de todos los órganos apropiados para su aumento y reemplazaremos los menos eficientes, Lord Capitán».

languages.text: "Ogmentasyona uygun her organın kapsamlı incelemesini yapacağız Lord Kaptan, sonra hangisi en verimsizse onu değiştireceğiz."
languages.original_text: "We will carry out a thorough examination of each organ suitable for augmentation, Lord Captain, and replace whichever is least efficient."

traits.locale_text: "Ogmentasyona uygun her organın kapsamlı incelemesini yapacağız Lord Kaptan, sonra hangisi en verimsizse onu değiştireceğiz."

languages.text: "Wir werden eine gründliche Untersuchung aller für Augmentationen geeigneten Organe durchführen, Lord Captain, und das ineffizienteste Organ ersetzen."
languages.original_text: "We will carry out a thorough examination of each organ suitable for augmentation, Lord Captain, and replace whichever is least efficient."

traits.locale_text: "Wir werden eine gründliche Untersuchung aller für Augmentationen geeigneten Organe durchführen, Lord Captain, und das ineffizienteste Organ ersetzen."
